Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr create --title "Redesign UI and add real resource data" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Redesign entire UI with NeetCode-inspired dark/light theme \(blue-gray oklch color system\)
- NeetCode-style course layout: collapsible sidebar with sections, progress bar, lesson rating, table of contents
- Resource hub overhaul: search bar, source icons \(Ko-fi, GitHub, Booth, etc.\), FREE badges, aligned cards
- Replace 18 placeholder assets with 11 real Ko-fi VTuber resources from spreadsheet
- Add Pro landing page, theme toggle, and global cursor pointer

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify dark/light theme toggle works across all pages
- [ ] Browse resources with filters, search, and source icons
- [ ] Navigate course lessons with sidebar, prev/next, and rating
- [ ] Run `npm run seed:assets` to populate real resource data

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr create --repo drewfoos/coffeejg-course --title "Replace iframe embed with Plyr custom video player" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Replace raw Vimeo/YouTube iframe with Plyr-based custom video player
- CoffeeJG purple branding on all controls via `--plyr-color-main` CSS variable
- Custom controls: play/pause, progress, time, volume, fullscreen
- Hides all native Vimeo/YouTube chrome \(title, byline, recommendations\)
- Right-click disabled, Vimeo DNT enabled, YouTube no-cookie mode
- Clean unmount on navigation \(no "provider destroyed" errors\)
- Removed old custom player module \(8 files\) and `@vimeo/player` dependency

## Test plan
- [ ] Navigate to a lesson page — video loads with custom Plyr controls
- [ ] Verify purple branding on seek bar, volume slider, and button hovers
- [ ] Test play/pause, seek, volume, mute, fullscreen
- [ ] Test keyboard shortcuts \(space, arrows, m, f\)
- [ ] Right-click on player is disabled
- [ ] Navigate away \(back button\) — no console errors
- [ ] Free lessons load without auth, paid lessons require enrollment

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")

Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr create --title "Add Cloudflare Turnstile bot protection to auth forms" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Cloudflare Turnstile widget on login, signup, and forgot-password forms
- Server-side token verification before session cookie creation and password reset
- Forgot-password moved from client-side Firebase call to server action with Turnstile enforcement
- Google OAuth skips Turnstile \(Google's own bot protection applies\)
- Graceful degradation: skips in dev, fails open if Cloudflare unreachable

## Test plan
- [ ] Login form shows Turnstile widget and submits successfully
- [ ] Signup form shows Turnstile widget and creates account
- [ ] Forgot-password form verifies Turnstile before sending reset email
- [ ] Google sign-in still works without Turnstile
- [ ] Dev mode works without Turnstile keys configured
- [ ] Add `NEXT_PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY` and `TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY` to Vercel env vars

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
